response:
The castle, which Sir James Montgomery, 4th Baronet is the tenth laird of, stands on the **eastern shore** of the **Firth of Clyde**, Scotland. 

This information is derived directly from the context, which states:  
*"Skelmorlie Castle: Skelmorlie Castle stands on the eastern shore of the Firth of Clyde, Scotland, at the north-western corner of the county of Ayrshire."*
